automationOutputFileId.description: The ID of an AutomationOutputFile configured to with CSV transform argument. Transform parameters will be read from file settings.

blobOrFileId.description: The ID of a blob link or the API ID of a file to process.

connectionId.description: The ID of a connection to read the instrument vendor from.

mapperConfig.description: A JSON configuration specifying how to convert a JSON file to CSV. Reach out to Benchling Support for more information about how to create a mapperConfig.

transformType.description: The transform type to use to convert an ASM file to CSV.

vendor.description: The instrument vendor to use for conversion. See /connect/list-allotropy-vendors.
